name: String Concat
description: Concatenates two strings with an optional separator.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class StringConcatNode(BaseNode):
    name = "String Concat"
    description = "Concatenates two strings with an optional separator."
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/string.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("str1", "string")
        self.add_input("str2", "string")
        self.add_input("separator", "string")
        self.add_output("combined", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        s1_val = inputs.get("str1")
        s2_val = inputs.get("str2")
        sep_val = inputs.get("separator")
        
        s1 = str(s1_val) if s1_val is not None else ""
        s2 = str(s2_val) if s2_val is not None else ""
        sep = str(sep_val) if sep_val is not None else " "
        
        res = f"{s1}{sep}{s2}"
        return {"combined": res}

def register_node():
    return StringConcatNode
